scripts.build:prod: DEPLOY_BASE=/ VITE_SITE_URL=https://me-event.ru vite-react-ssg build && SITE_URL=https://me-event.ru node scripts/retarget-domain.mjs
scripts.zip:prod: npm run build:prod && rm -f me-event-site-dist.zip && (cd dist && zip -r -X ../me-event-site-dist.zip . -x '.DS_Store' -x '**/.DS_Store') && echo '\nГотово: me-event-site-dist.zip'
